gh_791800c8db99244781c6cb8e.title: 🔥 [資深] 3.5M/Y 全端軟體工程師 (全遠端) 🛠 Senior Full-Stack Engineer (Remote) 🚀
gh_791800c8db99244781c6cb8e.description:
## **About Us**

We are a **rapidly growing software technology startup** from Silicon Valley, founded by top engineers from Stanford and MIT. Our dynamic team brings together extensive experience and diverse backgrounds in finance and consulting from New York, San Francisco, and Chicago. As a fully remote company, we offer a unique opportunity for exceptional individuals to join our team. We foster a culture that values both practicality and creativity, providing an meritocratic environment for you to showcase your skills and contribute to the creation of innovative products.

Are you seeking a company that transcends traditional constraints of location and time?

If you meet the following criteria, we want to work with you:

1. **Proactive and Independent:** Embrace the freedom to control your own working hours and enjoy the benefits of flexible schedules.
2. **Fully Remote:** Escape the confines of a traditional office setting and thrive in a fully remote work environment.
3. **Ownership and Involvement:** Crave a sense of involvement and autonomy, where your ideas and contributions are valued and recognized.
4. **Strong Entrepreneurial Spirit:** High-energy, possess an adventurous and startup mindset, unafraid of embracing unknown challenges.
5. **Passion for the International Product:** Fuel your ambition by working on projects that transcend borders and embrace the opportunity to collaborate with teams across different parts of the world.

If you are driven, hard-working, and ready to make a significant impact, we would love to hear from you. Join our team and embark on an exciting journey of innovation and growth!

**APPLY NOW:** **https://linktr.ee/growaha**

# **Job Description**

As a Senior Full Stack Engineer, you'll be key to building and maintaining our innovative web applications, working across both front-end and back-end to ensure a robust, seamless user experience.

### **Your Journey as a Senior Full-Stack Engineer**

1. Work with our tech stack comprising JavaScript, React, Material UI (MUI), Node.js, and other languages, while swiftly adapting to JavaScript if your expertise lies elsewhere.
2. Handle SQL-based databases, mainly PostgreSQL, using ORMs to interact effectively.
3. Utilize containers, K8, and AWS ECS for reliable and efficient application deployment.
4. Develop mobile interfaces using React Native.
5. Collaborate with multidisciplinary teams through the full development cycle, from API design to deployment. This includes code reviews, developing reusable code, and collaborating with various engineering teams.
6. Work with our design team to address user pain points and drive improvements in engineering standards and processes. You'll also develop new tools for internal teams and take ownership of your work.
7. Design, build, and maintain APIs, iterating to enhance functionality.
8. Troubleshoot and debug software systems, integrate new components as needed, and address production issues.
9. Launch new markets, features, or products regularly, staying agile to meet market demands.

### **What You Bring**

1. Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field. Advanced degrees preferred.
2. 5+ years of experience in full stack development on complex web applications.
3. Proficiency in front-end technologies like JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, and a modern framework such as React.
4. Solid understanding of back-end development using Node.js, Python, or similar.
5. Experience with PostgreSQL and SQL Server databases, including data modeling and query optimization.
6. Familiarity with version control systems (Git), agile methodologies, and CI/CD pipelines.
7. Knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) is a plus.
8. Excellent problem-solving skills with an ability to debug complex software issues.
9. Strong communication and collaboration skills with a team-oriented mindset.

By joining us, you'll not only be a part of a dynamic, innovative environment, but you'll also have the opportunity to grow your technical skills, contribute directly to the success of our projects, and make a tangible impact in our rapidly evolving field. Our inclusive culture encourages collaboration and continuous learning, ensuring that you stay abreast of the latest trends and technologies, broadening your professional horizons, and furthering your career.

### Additional Qualifications

We are seeking individuals who possess the following qualifications:

1. **Self-Motivation and Ownership:** Demonstrate self-motivation, a passion for continuous learning, and the ability to manage your own work effectively.
2. **User-Centric Mindset:** Show a strong desire to meet user needs and a relentless pursuit of achievement and excellence.
3. **Adaptability and Quick Learning:** Exhibit a customer-oriented approach, with the ability to quickly learn new skills and adapt to unfamiliar domains.
4. **Collaborative Spirit:** Display a willingness to actively participate in the team environment and collaborate effectively with diverse team members.

### Competitive Compensation

We offer competitive salary levels; details can be found at [[linktr.ee/growaha](https://linktr.ee/growaha)](https://linktr.ee/growaha). Our salary structure includes flexible working hours, a fully remote setup, and monthly performance-based raises, bonuses, and rewards. 

### This Job Offers You

When you join our team, you can expect:

1. **Flexible and Independent Remote Work:** Enjoy the freedom of flexible working hours and the ability to work remotely.
2. **Performance-Based Rewards:** Receive rewards and bonuses based on your performance and contributions.
3. **Driven and Talented Co-workers:** Collaborate with a group of driven, creative, and multi-talented colleagues who share a deep passion for startups.
4. **Ownership and Impact:** Take direct ownership of your role and responsibilities, making a meaningful impact in our innovative culture.
5. **Learn to Solve Challenging Issues:** Work closely with teams dedicated to creating solutions for some of the most relevant and challenging issues.
6. **Positive Work Environment:** Thrive in a work environment built on trust, accountability, collaboration, curiosity, fearlessness, kindness, and respect.

Please review our **Pre-Interview Info at [[linktr.ee/growaha](https://linktr.ee/growaha)](https://linktr.ee/growaha)** before applying.

Ready to join our team? **Apply now at [[linktr.ee/growaha](https://linktr.ee/growaha)](https://linktr.ee/growaha)**.

gh_798a3404121487925fc3a6d0.title: OneSecondDelivery: Machine learning dataset engineer for GPT scale ML project
gh_798a3404121487925fc3a6d0.description: **Tags:** #machine-learning #pytorch #tensorflow #computer-vision #ml #deep-learning #python #data-science #engineer **Published on:** October 31, 2021 **Original Job Post:** https://remoteOK.io/remote-jobs/106921-remote-machine-learning-dataset-engineer-for-gpt-scale-ml-project-oneseconddelivery ![](https://remoteOK.io/assets/img/jobs/f9f9673aadca1a2dc1d603f196c35ec01635705116.png) **Promising drone-delivery startup is hiring a Dataset and Machine Learning Manager to work remotely. OneSec is working on a groundbreaking GPT-scale machine learning project to make autonomous delivery drones. In this job, you will build the Datasets and Neural Networks that fly our autonomous delivery drones. These drones will then deliver millions of meals and other packages in the real world.** ##About OneSecondDelivery We are creating a food delivery app that uses autonomous drones to deliver the food. We deliver everything 5 times faster and 100 times cheaper, thanks to small autonomous delivery-robots. The company was founded in 2017 by a leading expert on drone legislation and a successful e-commerce entrepreneur. The Swiss Federal Institute of Technology’s Vice Presidency of Innovation has recognized the large potential of this project and has supported us with the XGrant Prize and other resources. ##Job Description OneSec is building one of the largest machine learning projects in the drone industry. With our own photorealistic flight simulator, and a fleet of prototype drones, we have built one of the largest 3d perception dataset in the world, and we are building a large computer cluster of NVIDIA and Tenstorrent chips to scale up our machine learning to GPT-Scale. ####Your job has 3 components: * Neural network training and optimization * Dataset management and generation * Supporting our hardware team in building up our exaflop-scale machine learning cluster ####Here are some of the Neural Networks you will be building: -Delivery surface finder: A neural net that picks the optimal delivery surface within a balcony or backyard of a customer. Usually this will be a table or chair or a section of the floor that has enough clearance. -OneSec Fruxel Depthmap: This is a convolutional neural network that takes camera images and generates a simple, but highly sophisticated vector representation of the space around the drone. Our pathplanner then uses this depthmap to plan a collision free path for the drone. -Visual Odometry Model: Our control system always needs an accurate understanding of how our drone is moving around from frame to frame. -Payload Positon tracker: While delivering the package, our control system needs to know how the package is sliding out of the payload bay. This model simply takes in the camera images and outputs the current location of the package. -Delivery Clearance Model: This model checks the camera images to see if the scene is safe to approach. We don't fly into a balcony if there's a human or dog in it. And when we approach a restaurant to pickup a package, we make sure the scene is clear of humans, pets etc. ###Requirements * The most important thing is that you are excited about this project, and like the mission of our company. * Highly knowledgeable about machine learning and neural networks. Both practical and theoretical. * Experience with computer vision and convolutional networks * Experience with PyTorch and TensorFlow * Good computer skills, and general tech savvy: you will do many tasks like setting up recording devices to record datasets, creating small python programs for dataset labelling and management, post processing large image datasets etc. * Computer programming experience in other areas is helpful Be sure to mention the words **AUTHOR EXCHANGE MARKET** when applying to show you read the job post completely. This is a beta feature to avoid spam applicants. Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human. #Salary and compensation No salary data published by company so we estimated salary based on previous jobs related to . $20,000 — $100,000/year ### Location Eastern Europe, Latin America, South Asia, Middle East/africa
